name: Sponsor Dashboard
description: Auxiliary esports sponsor surface for managing brand partnerships, tracking deal value, impressions, and activation metrics across sponsors.

page_briefs.sponsors: Sponsor list page. Top region renders a data-table listing all partners with columns for brand, tier, contract start, contract end, deal value, activation count, and account owner. Below, a content card-grid shows sponsor logos with tier badges and active-deal counts, giving brand-forward access to the roster for exec reviews.
page_briefs.sponsor-detail: Single sponsor profile page. Detail-header at top shows the brand logo, tier, contract term, primary contact, and contract value. Below, a dashboard kpi-grid tracks impressions delivered, social reach, activation count, and contractual obligations met. Bottom region renders a chart-grid with trend lines for impressions over time, deliverable completion rate, and engagement by activation type.
